title: Topic: IBA Bare Knuckle 4IBA Bare Knuckle 4: Romero vs. Vagabov

posts.author: Tapology
posts.content: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: IlikeMMAandboobs
posts.content:
Romero vs. Vagabov
Romero, UD
I don't see either of them getting KO'ed or losing too badly. Vagabov's record is mostly made of cans (Like most of Russian fighters, obviously), and even though he's 30-1, he didn't fight the same competition as Romero at all. Also, Romero might be the first human to still be in his prime at 48, and Vagabov is 40, so the age difference means nearly nothing here.
COME ON YOEL!
